docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY TANG, SHAOZHEN AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, LINDA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-30-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TANG, SHAOZHEN AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, LINDA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-30-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-30-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER NORAH YUEN UYEDA PRESENT ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. CALVIN JENG INTERPRETS ENGLISH/CANTONESE - CANTONESE-ENGLISH ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-30-2008 - JUDGMENT. (CLERK-BETH WILBER)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TANG, SHAOZHEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WONG, LINDA $2,250.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,250.00, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS DAMAGES FOR PROPERTY LOSS IN THE SUM OF $250.00 AND CIVIL PENALTIES IN THE SUM OF $2,000.00 PURSUANT TO CIVIL CODE SECTION 1940.2 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TANG, SHAOZHEN ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF TANG, SHAOZHEN
